leadText: If you were looking for the Pokémon Generations episode titled "The Old Chateau", see PG10. The Old Chateau (Japanese: 森の洋館 Forest Manor) is an abandoned manor house near the exit of the Eterna Forest.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] The Japanese name of the Old Chateau is homophonous with that of the Old Gateau (Japanese: もりのヨウカン); both terms are pronounced as Mori no Yōkan . The English names of the Old Chateau and Old Gateau were coined by translator Nob Ogasawara , intending to preserve the pun in the original Japanese text. [ 1 ] [ 2 ] According to Nob, he was able to keep the Old Chateau/Old Gateau pun in part due to him being able to give more input in the localization process from Generation III onward. [ 3 ] In Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl , the portrait with glowing red eyes appears to be a cropped and flipped version of Joseph Karl Stieler 's portrait of Ludwig van Beethoven . ↑ Interview with Nob Ogasawara by ANMTV. Posted on YouTube on September 28, 2022. ↑ Interview with Nob Ogasawara by TheSpeedGamers (Part 2-2). Livestreamed on June 24, 2014; recording posted on YouTube on August 7, 2014. ↑ Lets Break PKMN Blue Thread Bits.txt (itself found here )
